violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (3 ice wells) were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC stated ice wells are sanitized before each show. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Drain plugs are lacking at the 3 bay sink in the catering kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sinks in the kitchens. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine in the green room have an accumulation of dust. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The formica counter top in one kitchen area is in poor repair, held on with tape. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2026
Two handsinks are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

Food contact surfaces of the 3 ice machines were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machines were turned off to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the front of house kitchenette refrigerator. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024

The door to the outside, located at the Richmond Street entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in green room near refrigerator. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Big Blue Bug pest control service monthly, last date of service 6/18/2024. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Plastic utensils are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchens and service areas. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
the dishwasher is not a commercial grade dishwasher, housed in a wood cabinet which is in poor repair. Commercial grade equipment is required. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: refrigerators, including door tracks in green room catering refrigerator beverage coolers, especially in lobby New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The floors especially in the kitchen and green room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2024
